description_long: This electric drill features a robust, industrial design with a predominantly matte black and dark metallic body accented by copper and brass-colored details. The main housing is cylindrical with visible ventilation slots and ribbed sections for heat dissipation, while the handle is ergonomically shaped with a textured grip for secure handling. A trigger button is integrated into the handle, and a metallic loop is attached near the rear, possibly for hanging or securing the tool. The front section includes a barrel-like extension where a drill bit would be attached, but currently, no drill bit is present. Several exposed wires and mechanical details give the drill a rugged, high-tech appearance, suggesting durability and power. The overall construction appears solid, with a mix of metal and plastic components, suitable for heavy-duty urban or workshop use.
description: A rugged, industrial electric drill with a matte black and metallic body, copper accents, and ergonomic grip. Features visible ventilation slots, exposed wires, and a robust, high-tech design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the drill, ergonomic handle, trigger button, copper accents, and exposed wires.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel opening for the drill bit and the symmetrical ventilation slots on the body.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the handle, trigger, and additional mechanical details, mirroring the first side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the handle, attachment loop, and the rear housing details.
